manifest.name: Vault Galaxy

name: Vault Galaxy

releases.author: sjhealthadvising-prog
releases.description:
Initial public release.

Vault Galaxy renders your vault as a living orbital galaxy: most-linked notes become suns, hubs orbit them, every note orbits what it links to (tighter orbit = more links). Two view modes (spiral galaxy / folder clusters), content-weighted node sizes, grabbable link-coupled spring physics, live-tunable forces/display/colors, and a settings tab for mapping your vault's conventions — or full auto-detection with zero config.
